## Architecture Overview (auto-generated by codesift)

**39 MCP tools** | TypeScript | tree-sitter AST + BM25F + semantic search + LSP bridge

**src/tools/** (17 files) — MCP tool handlers: index, search, outline, graph, impact, route, community, context, diff, analysis, report
**src/lsp/** (4 files) — LSP bridge: JSON-RPC client, server configs (6 languages), session manager, tool handlers (go_to_definition, get_type_info, rename_symbol)
**src/parser/extractors/** (9 files) — Language extractors: TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Go, Rust, Prisma, Markdown, Astro
**src/storage/** (8 files) — Index persistence, embedding store, usage tracker, watcher, registry
**src/retrieval/** (5 files) — codebase_retrieval batch engine, semantic/hybrid search, RRF fusion
**src/search/** (4 files) — BM25F index with centrality bonus, semantic embeddings, chunker (symbol-aware)
**src/utils/** (6 files) — Import graph, glob (picomatch), walk, git validation, test file detection, framework detection
**src/cli/** (3 files) — CLI commands and help
**tests/** — 392+ tests (Vitest)
